data.name: Arena of Sacrifice
data.detailed_description:
米乃莉是一名技藝高超的魔法師兼巫女，她接受了討伐「邪眼」的危險任務，以證明自己的實力。然而在潛入城堡時，她陷入強大的陷阱，失去了魔力。就在希望破滅之際，一名神祕的治癒者現身，幫助她恢復並重新掌握力量。

如今，米乃莉必須殺出重圍，挑戰重重關卡。她的最終目標：深入城堡核心，徹底擊敗邪眼。

《Arena of Sacrifice》是一款刺激的2D橫版清版動作遊戲，戰鬥系統紮實且節奏明快。突破關卡，使用分歧技能連招擊退敵人，同時避免受到攻擊。隨著遊戲進展，你將解鎖更多戰鬥招式，而敵人也會逐漸變得更難對付！

  • 快節奏戰鬥與分支連招，突破敵人洶湧的攻勢。

  • 隨著米乃莉恢復魔力，不斷解鎖新技能，每一關都帶來更多選擇

  • 多樣化的敵人，各自擁有獨特的設計與戰鬥風格。學習他們的招式，提前預判攻擊！

  • 多個地城關卡與逐步升級的高難度BOSS戰，挑戰層層加劇

  • 像素藝術風格，營造懷舊的復古氛圍

data.short_description: 一款2D橫向卷軸動作遊戲。突破充滿敵人的高難關卡，掌握精準戰鬥技巧，靈活迴避傷害，通過重重考驗，最終擊敗邪眼BOSS。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Arena of Sacrifice
data.detailed_description:
Minori, a skilled mage and priestess, takes on the dangerous mission of defeating the Evil Eye to prove her strength. After infiltrating his castle, she falls victim to a powerful trap and loses her magic. Just as hope seems lost, she’s rescued by a mysterious healer who helps her recover and regain her abilities.

Now, Minori must fight her way through enemy-filled stages, each offering new challenges. Her ultimate goal: reach the heart of the castle and defeat the Evil Eye once and for all.

Arena of Sacrifice is a fun 2D beat 'em up side scroller with a solid and fast paced combat system. Power through different stages, fighting off enemies with your branching power moves, while avoiding to get hit yourself. The more you progress, the more combat moves you unlock, while at the same time the enemies get harder too!

  • Fast paced combat and branching combo moves to get through the enemy's onslaught.

  • Unlock new skills as Minori recovers her magic, expanding your options with each stage.

  • A variety of enemies, each with a unique design and fighting style. Learn all their moves and predict their strikes ahead of time!

  • Multiple dungeon levels and challenging boss fights that become progressively tougher.

  • Pixel art graphics that give the game a nostalgic, retro feel.

data.short_description: A 2D side-scrolling action game where you battle through challenging stages filled with enemies. Master precise combat, avoid damage, and push forward through each trial to reach and defeat the Evil Eye.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
